From 118.00s-123.00s, the friends are outside the vehicle in heavy rain, standing in front of the parked car with headlights on, and dispersing away from the car. From 124.00s-128.00s, a close-up shows a distressed man holding a flashlight and calling out 'Mike' and 'Justin.' From 129.00s-132.00s, the same man is still holding a flashlight while turning and running through a dark wooded area.
Retrieved frames at 118.00s, 119.00s, 120.00s, 130.00s, 131.00s, and 132.00s, covering the immediate post-exit roadside interval and the later wooded search interval.

This supports a post-exit flashlight/search sequence rather than any lantern appearance.
Earlier review noted a person holding a light source near the car and no grounded visual evidence of gunfire or rifle-cocking, but the object type was unresolved there.

transcript_segments.text: Thick shot, dude. You actually get more points when it hits the board. Thanks, guys. You guys think you got something? Let me see you do it. It's all about confidence, Taylor. That just happened. No way. Who does that? I do that.

What's up, brother? I ended up staying at Dave's last night. I just woke up. Now he's missing. Last night was obviously pretty weird. Alex is acting like super, super strange. Yeah, I can't find him. Holy shit. I just seen Dave walking into the woods.

You saw him in the woods? I'm coming to get you. Be ready. Okay, yeah, just come to Dustin's. Did you change your pants? I don't want that smell on my truck, man. Yeah, I took a shower and changed my pants. Just saying. Well, I'm almost there. Be ready. Yeah, I'll see you soon. Grab lights. Make sure you got lights. Okay, bye.

transcript_segments.text: What's up? What's going on guys? We gotta go. Dude, I'm actually starting to believe Dave is 11. Honestly dude, me too. Last night when I got home, Alex kept saying he was Will. Kept talking about the upside down, Demogorgons. Dude, he puked up a leech. Puked up a leech?
Yeah, dude. It's gotta be real. How else could he have made me piss myself? And he made you shit your pants, dude. It's not funny, guys. Dave has powers. Made you shit your pants? Oh, Mr. Poop Pants.

transcript_segments.text: Mike! Dustin! Mike! Mike! Mike! Dustin! Lucas! Mike! Mike! Eleven? It's me!

Will! Will? Will! Eleven. What are you doing here? How'd you get out of the Upside Down? Pop saved me. I'm just glad you're here, Will. What the hell are you guys doing? That's the guy that kidnapped me. I... I did not. I didn't.

transcript_segments.text: Let's not do that. Dave. Eleven. We're your friends. Friend? Yes, friends. Will. Friend. What is going on right now? Alright, here's my stop. Alright man, I gotta drop these guys off and I'm coming back. Do not watch Stranger Things.
Why? Just promise me, dude. I'll be right back. I'm gonna drop these guys off. Okay. Taylor! Mike, come in. It's Lucas. Over. Taylor? Mike! Taylor! Mike! Dude! You watched it, didn't you?

dense_caption_spans.visual: A man with a beard, glasses, and a brown bomber jacket stands in a cluttered garage. He holds a can of beer and throws a dart with a focused expression. The dart flies through the air and hits the bullseye of an electronic dartboard mounted on a wooden wall.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The distinct 'thwack' sound of the dart hitting the board.

dense_caption_spans.visual: The scene cuts to a different man, who is large and wearing a plaid shirt, sitting in a chair and smiling as he watches the first man. It then cuts to a third man in an orange puffer jacket, who is also watching and reaches up to adjust the dartboard.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint ambient room tone.

transcript_spans.text: Thick shot, dude. You actually get more points when it hits the board. Thanks, guys. You guys think you got something? Let me see you do it. It's all about confidence, Taylor. That just happened. No way. Who does that? I do that.

What's up, brother? I ended up staying at Dave's last night. I just woke up. Now he's missing. Last night was obviously pretty weird. Alex is acting like super, super strange. Yeah, I can't find him. Holy shit. I just seen Dave walking into the woods.

You saw him in the woods? I'm coming to get you. Be ready. Okay, yeah, just come to Dustin's. Did you change your pants? I don't want that smell on my truck, man. Yeah, I took a shower and changed my pants. Just saying. Well, I'm almost there. Be ready. Yeah, I'll see you soon. Grab lights. Make sure you got lights. Okay, bye.

dense_caption_spans.visual: A man with a beard and a black cap is shown in profile, talking on a phone in a dark, outdoor setting. The scene then cuts to another man in a bright orange puffer jacket, sitting in a cluttered garage and also on the phone. He is surrounded by tools, a workbench, and a trash can.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, ambient musical score begins to play.

dense_caption_spans.visual: The scene cuts back to the man in the cap, who is now in a car. He looks over his shoulder with a concerned expression. In the background, the man in the orange jacket is still visible, now leaning back in his chair with a relaxed posture.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, ambient music continues.

transcript_spans.text: What's up? What's going on guys? We gotta go. Dude, I'm actually starting to believe Dave is 11. Honestly dude, me too. Last night when I got home, Alex kept saying he was Will. Kept talking about the upside down, Demogorgons. Dude, he puked up a leech. Puked up a leech?
Yeah, dude. It's gotta be real. How else could he have made me piss myself? And he made you shit your pants, dude. It's not funny, guys. Dave has powers. Made you shit your pants? Oh, Mr. Poop Pants.

One person in a red and black striped shirt is in the foreground, while others follow behind. The scene then cuts to a close-up of a man with long, messy blonde hair and a black turtleneck, looking distressed and shouting as rain falls around him.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of heavy rain and the low rumble of a car engine.

dense_caption_spans.visual: A montage of quick cuts shows different people in the dark, rainy forest. A man in a black jacket and cap holds a lantern high, illuminating the dense foliage. Another man with a beard, wearing a grey hoodie and a Columbia baseball cap, also holds a lantern, looking around with a concerned expression. The camera cuts between them as they navigate the dark woods.
audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The continuous sound of heavy rain and a low, ominous ambient tone.

transcript_spans.text: Mike! Dustin! Mike! Mike! Mike! Dustin! Lucas! Mike! Mike! Eleven? It's me!

Will! Will? Will! Eleven. What are you doing here? How'd you get out of the Upside Down? Pop saved me. I'm just glad you're here, Will. What the hell are you guys doing? That's the guy that kidnapped me. I... I did not. I didn't.

transcript_spans.text: Let's not do that. Dave. Eleven. We're your friends. Friend? Yes, friends. Will. Friend. What is going on right now? Alright, here's my stop. Alright man, I gotta drop these guys off and I'm coming back. Do not watch Stranger Things.
Why? Just promise me, dude. I'll be right back. I'm gonna drop these guys off. Okay. Taylor! Mike, come in. It's Lucas. Over. Taylor? Mike! Taylor! Mike! Dude! You watched it, didn't you?
